programs.desc: Emily Chang explores Stargate, a $500 billion AI project; she interviews OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son about their vision for the initiative.

programs.title: Quantum Marketing

programs.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programs.title: Quantum Marketing
programs.desc: Lisa McKnight, Mattel's Chief Brand Officer, has been at the forefront of reintroducing the iconic Barbie to the world; the toy brand has launched itself beyond store shelves and onto the silver screen.
